text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I finish up training with Taiki Shuttle...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yay, all done!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha, I know! I'll cool down like a champ!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who's that over there?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... J-just twenty more laps to... go...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, Doto! You're doing great out there!
Feelin' all right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek! T-Taiki?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm fine! I'm just training by myself! So you don't
need to... I mean...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-you don't need to worry about me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can I ask ya something? Is it all right if I
cool down later?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I think Doto's overworking herself again! I know
it's nothin' new, but this time I gotta step in...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run over as fast as I can and give her a
big ol' hug! These arms of mine'll get her restin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run over as fast as I can and give her a
big ol' hug! These arms of mine'll get her restin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes! I just knew you'd say that, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle runs off at top speed and snatches
up Meisho Doto. It looks like the plan to make
her take a break is working.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest we ask some other trainers for advice on
how to make Meisho Doto get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! Protecting Doto is something we all
gotta do together—a group mission!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You're one smart cookie, Trainer! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's make this mission a big success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with everyone's help, Meisho Doto finally
gets some rest. Taiki Shuttle seems very satisfied.
